name: Hot and Sour Scallop Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 cups canned low sodium chicken broth
1/2 lb sea or bay scallops -- sliced 1/4-inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken broth, mushrooms and bamboo shoots in a saucepan.
Bring to boil, reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
2. Rinse scallops under cold running water.
3. Add scallops, soy sauce and pepper. Bring to a boil.
4. Mix the cornstarch with the warm water. Stir until smooth.
5. Gradually add the cornstarch mixture into the pan while stirring.
Continue to stir for a few seconds until thickened.
6. Stir briskly with a chopstick or spoon, then gradually pour in egg.
7. Turn off heat and stir in vinegar (2 tablespoons white wine vinegar may be substituted).
Sprinkle with thinly sliced green onions.
8. Serve immediately.
